name: connect-intel
description: Connect Intel — B2B lead search platform

scripts.prod:preview: node scripts/verify-deploy.mjs && npm run preview --prefix frontend -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173
scripts.build:standalone: cd frontend && STANDALONE=1 npm run build
scripts.open: open index.html 2>/dev/null || xdg-open index.html 2>/dev/null || echo 'Open index.html in your browser'
